name: Kimi K2 Thinking
tagline: 1T MoE reasoning model with native INT4 quantization and 256K context; can run 200-300 sequential tool calls.
seoTitle: Kimi K2 Thinking — Moonshot AI (Kimi) LLM specs
metaDescription: Kimi K2 Thinking (Moonshot AI (Kimi)), released 2025-11-06 — part of the Kimi K2 Thinking line. 1T MoE reasoning model with native INT4 quantization and 256K c…
overview: Kimi K2 Thinking is a large language model from Moonshot AI (Kimi), part of the Kimi K2 Thinking line. Released 2025-11-06. Open-weight reasoning ('thinking agent') variant of K2 that interleaves chain-of-thought with native tool calls.
What's notable in this version: 1T MoE reasoning model with native INT4 quantization and 256K context; can run 200-300 sequential tool calls. Open weights, Modified MIT.
